description: This file defines API routes for the 'mind map' feature of a career navigation web application. It provides endpoints to generate a graph of roles and transitions, as well as detailed information about individual nodes. The code includes functions for data normalization, salary parsing, node and edge creation, filtering, and loading role data from repositories or in-memory defaults.

methods.name: _normalizeLabel(v)
methods.description: Normalizes role labels by trimming whitespace and replacing multiple spaces with a single space.

methods.name: _safeArray(v)
methods.description: Ensures the input is returned as an array; returns empty array if input is not an array.

methods.name: _parseSalaryRangeToLpaMidpoint(salaryRange)
methods.description: Parses various salary string formats into an approximate midpoint in LPA (Lakhs Per Annum).

methods.name: _roleToNode(role, { isCenter = false, level = 1, score = null } = {})
methods.description: Converts a role object into a node representation for the mind map, including computed fields like salary midpoint.

methods.name: _buildEdge({ from, to, label = null, timeHorizon = null })
methods.description: Creates an edge object representing a progression between two roles, with optional labels and time horizon data.

methods.name: _loadCatalogRoles()
methods.description: Loads roles from the repository if available; falls back to in-memory default catalog.

methods.name: _applyFiltersToNodes(nodes, { minSalaryLpa = null, maxSalaryLpa = null, minSkillSimilarity = null } = {})
methods.description: Filters nodes based on salary range and skill similarity criteria.

methods.name: _buildDetailsForNode(node, { centerNode })
methods.description: Constructs detailed information for a specific node, including skills gap, salary, and transition timeline.

ctags.name: _applyFiltersToNodes
ctags.signature: (nodes, { minSalaryLpa = null, maxSalaryLpa = null, minSkillSimilarity = null } = {})

ctags.name: _buildEdge
ctags.pattern: /^function _buildEdge({ from, to, label = null, timeHorizon = null }) {$/
ctags.signature: ({ from, to, label = null, timeHorizon = null })
